response.justification: The role requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems with compute, storage, or hardware focus. The candidate's C++ experience is limited to a 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015, and there is no demonstrated cloud compute platform or distributed systems leadership at the required scale. The strongest experience is in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang web/data services, which does not match the C++ cloud-compute infrastructure focus of this role.
strengths: Long career with broad full-stack and systems exposure across multiple languages
Some low-latency, high-throughput service experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Teaching, workshops, and mentoring track record (Refactoring Dojos, Selenium course, talks)
concerns: Far below the 8-year C++ requirement — only ~6 months of professional C++ at NI
No demonstrated cloud compute platform, large-scale distributed infrastructure, or hardware architecture work
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at the required level

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / distributed infrastructure experience
Limited formal tech-lead role for cloud/DevOps teams
